title: 日本ダービーの後に・瞳に映ったもの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I knew it! I knew I'd become this year's
Derby champion!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How could it possibly be anyone else? Ohohoho!
Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, of course! I am a first-rate Umamusume, after all!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! Would you mind looking this way and
posing for a picture?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Of course! Now, everyone will know who I...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, nothing. It's just, a more victorious-looking
background would be more appropriate, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Sure, in front of the racetrack might be
conventional, but wouldn't it suit me better to be
standing on a gorgeously decorated stage?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, there's been a change of plans! The
photo shoot in this location is finished!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I'm granting you the right to capture my
brilliance while I perform on stage!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That is all! Good day!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Wha—hold on just a second! Please wait!

text_block_list.name: Journalist
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, typical nepo baby. We can't just up and
change our schedules. How inconsiderate!

text_block_list.name: Journalist
text_block_list.text:
She was so arrogant about her win as well, like it
was meant to be. This was the Derby for crying
out loud! Some modesty would be nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can hear the photographers and journalists
complaining...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, everyone will know who I—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But something has caught King Halo's attention. I
follow her gaze and find...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sob... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Mom... I couldn't become the best in
Japan....

text_block_list.name: Journalist
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Where'd the winner go? Was she serious
about making us interview her at the concert?!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I set everything up here for nothing, huh...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer! You're late! You should know better than to keep me waiting.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"I'm sorry" isn't what I want to hear. I swear, can't
you indulge me a bit more? I just won the Derby,
you know.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm a first-rate Umamusume, which means you
need to start acting like a first-rate trai—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buzz, buzz.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph... It's my mother.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I wonder if she's ready to acknowledge me
after seeing my victory.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose I should see what she has to
say. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Mother? Hehe, I don't suppose you caught
the Der—

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: Yes, I saw it. It was quite amazing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It's been a good while since I've seen someone
capture the hearts of the crowd with their running
like Special Week.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But I'm the one who won...

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You were lucky, so you should end
on this high note before things turn sour.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
And just what in the world was that stunt you
pulled during the press conference? You don't
just walk away from the media like that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Abandoning your responsibilities just because you
won is what a child would do.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
If you keep up this behavior, the future will not
be kind to you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: You won't survive unless you fix your attitude.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Come home before you embarrass yourself even
further.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep. Click.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. We're continuing to the Kikuka Sho. I
plan to leave my mark there as well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm not going to let things end as they are now.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What does she know? I will survive. And I won't be a disgrace.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll continue to shine throughout the Classics like
the star I am!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose to anyone, be it Seiun Sky or Special
Week.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm King Halo! An Umamusume of talent!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And I deserve to be recognized! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her laugh doesn't carry the same spirit
as usual.
